cards.title: Patient Intake Scheduling
cards.body: New-patient form submissions — name, insurance carrier, reason for visit at a high level — flow into your scheduler and pre-populate a Calendly-style booking link within minutes. We keep the pipeline clear of PHI: clinical details stay inside your EHR, the automation only touches scheduling metadata.

cards.title: Appointment Reminder Sequence
cards.body: Two-way SMS reminders at 72h, 24h, and 2h before appointments, with a one-tap reschedule that writes back to your practice management system. For {{situationDetail}}, we'd tune the cadence and language to your no-show patterns — the right reminder schedule for dental is not the right one for behavioral health.

cards.title: Insurance Document Routing (Non-PHI)
cards.body: Faxed and emailed insurance verification docs get classified by carrier and plan type, then routed to the right billing coordinator's queue — without the automation ever reading clinical notes. Everything is kept inside your BAA-covered infrastructure; we scope out PHI-touching work unless you have a compliance lead driving the build.
cards.metric: ~5 hours/week back for billing; fewer mis-routed docs

ctaLine: Typical build is 3–5 weeks for a 5–30 provider practice. Book a call — we'll talk through what's in-scope vs. what needs a compliance-led engagement before we touch anything PHI-adjacent.
